173 E0800_RJCT_EVALTN_CD E0800_RJCT_EVALTN_CD E0800 Rejection of Care: Presence and Frequency CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the frequency that the resident rejected evaluation or care that is necessary to achieve the resident's goals for health and well-being. -=Not assessed/no information
